flavourText: Born from the building blocks of the universe. Only by mastering atoms and bonds can you topple this elemental giant.

dialogue.intro: I am forged from every element in the periodic table. Can you master my atomic structure?
dialogue.recallTaunt: Name my electron configurations and bonding types. Begin.
dialogue.applicationTaunt: You know the theory. Now explain how structure determines properties.
dialogue.extendedTaunt: The final element. Show me a complete answer worthy of full marks.
dialogue.defeated: You have mastered every element. The periodic table bows to you.
dialogue.survived: Your atomic knowledge is still in the ground state. Excite yourself and return.

flavourText: Fuelled by hydrocarbons and enthalpy. Break its bonds and extinguish its flames with Hess's law.

dialogue.intro: I burn with the energy of a thousand hydrocarbons. Can you calculate my enthalpy?
dialogue.recallTaunt: Define enthalpy of combustion. Name the key equations.
dialogue.applicationTaunt: Definitions are just the kindling. Apply Hess's law to put out my flames.
dialogue.extendedTaunt: Final combustion. Write a complete thermochemical analysis.
damageTaken: You have broken my C-H bonds!
dialogue.lowHp: My fuel reserves are almost empty!
dialogue.defeated: You have extinguished every flame. Complete combustion.
dialogue.survived: Your answers were incomplete combustion at best. Too much carbon monoxide.

flavourText: Rises from the brine, armed with oxidation and displacement. Balance the redox to drag it down.

dialogue.intro: I rise from the brine pools, armed with halogens. Can you balance my redox equations?
dialogue.recallTaunt: State the trends in Group 7. Electronegativity, boiling points, reactivity.
dialogue.applicationTaunt: Trends are just the surface. Explain the displacement reactions.
dialogue.extendedTaunt: Final displacement. Write a complete redox analysis.
dialogue.lowHp: I am being reduced to nothing!
dialogue.defeated: You have balanced every equation. The Kraken sinks.
dialogue.survived: Your half-equations were unbalanced. Return with better redox skills.

flavourText: A chain reaction of destruction in the stratosphere. Terminate its radicals before the ozone falls.

dialogue.intro: I propagate through the stratosphere, destroying ozone with every radical. Stop my chain reaction.
dialogue.recallTaunt: Define initiation, propagation and termination. What are radicals?
dialogue.applicationTaunt: You know the steps. Now explain how CFCs destroy the ozone layer.
dialogue.extendedTaunt: Final termination step. Write a complete mechanism.
dialogue.lowHp: My radicals are running out of ozone to destroy!
dialogue.defeated: Chain reaction terminated. You have saved the ozone layer.
dialogue.survived: Your understanding was only at the initiation step. The chain continues.

flavourText: Hides functional groups behind spectral disguises. Use IR and mass spec to reveal the cure.

dialogue.intro: My functional groups are hidden behind spectral peaks. Can you identify them all?
dialogue.recallTaunt: Name the key functional groups and their characteristic absorptions.
dialogue.applicationTaunt: You know the groups. Now interpret the spectra.
dialogue.extendedTaunt: Final spectrum. Deduce the complete structure from the data.
damageTaken: You have identified my carbonyl peak!
dialogue.lowHp: You are piecing together my entire structure!
dialogue.defeated: Structure fully elucidated. The cure is found.
dialogue.survived: You misread my spectra. The functional groups remain hidden.

flavourText: Commands reaction kinetics and equilibrium at industrial scale. Master Kc and rate equations to outpace it.

dialogue.intro: I control the rate and yield of every industrial reaction. Can you outpace me?
dialogue.recallTaunt: Define rate of reaction and state the factors that affect it.
dialogue.applicationTaunt: Factors are basic. Apply Le Chatelier's principle to shift my equilibrium.
dialogue.extendedTaunt: Final equilibrium. Write a complete analysis of rate and yield.
dialogue.lowHp: My activation energy has been lowered too far!
dialogue.defeated: You have optimised every condition. Maximum yield achieved.
dialogue.survived: Your yield was too low. Adjust the conditions and try again.

flavourText: Weaves amino acids into chains of protein armour. Hydrolyse its bonds to unravel its defences.

dialogue.intro: I weave amino acids into impenetrable protein armour. Can you unravel my structure?
dialogue.recallTaunt: Name the bond types in proteins. Primary, secondary, tertiary.
dialogue.applicationTaunt: You know the levels. Explain how they determine function.
dialogue.extendedTaunt: Final hydrolysis. Write a complete account of protein structure and function.
dialogue.lowHp: My quaternary structure is falling apart!
dialogue.defeated: Completely denatured. You have unravelled every chain.
dialogue.survived: Your understanding barely scratched my primary structure. Dig deeper.

flavourText: Lurks in the deep, shielded by buffer solutions and Born-Haber cycles. Only thermodynamic mastery prevails.

dialogue.intro: I lurk in the thermodynamic deep. Can you navigate Born-Haber cycles and entropy?
dialogue.recallTaunt: Define lattice enthalpy, entropy and free energy. State the equations.
dialogue.applicationTaunt: Equations are just the surface. Apply them to real systems.
dialogue.extendedTaunt: Final cycle. Construct a complete Born-Haber analysis.
dialogue.lowHp: My Gibbs free energy is becoming more negative... for you!
dialogue.defeated: Thermodynamically spontaneous defeat. You have mastered the deep.
dialogue.survived: Your calculations were not energetically favourable. Recalculate and return.

flavourText: Forged from d-block metals and complex ions. Measure its electrode potential to find its weakness.

dialogue.intro: I am forged from d-block metals. Can you determine my electrode potential?
dialogue.recallTaunt: Name the properties of transition metals. Oxidation states, complex ions.
dialogue.applicationTaunt: Properties are basic. Explain how electrode potentials predict feasibility.
dialogue.extendedTaunt: Final electrode. Write a complete electrochemical analysis.
damageTaken: You have measured my electrode potential!
dialogue.defeated: You have reduced me to base metal. Electrochemical mastery.
dialogue.survived: Your electrode potential was not positive enough. Recharge and return.

flavourText: Shifts colour through conjugation and delocalisation. Only Friedel-Crafts and organic synthesis can pin it down.

dialogue.intro: I shift between colours through conjugation and delocalisation. Can you pin me down?
dialogue.recallTaunt: Name the types of organic reactions. Define delocalisation.
dialogue.applicationTaunt: You know the reactions. Now plan a multi-step synthesis.
dialogue.extendedTaunt: Final synthesis. Design a complete reaction pathway.
damageTaken: You have cracked my aromatic ring!
dialogue.defeated: You have synthesised my downfall. Organic mastery achieved.
dialogue.survived: Your synthesis had too many side products. Purify your knowledge and return.
